        e(dv(.String 'WebApp::Tests::errors.gviweb')local0)
        ce(dv(.String '.non-existant-element')c1)
        ce(dv(.UInt32 0)c2)
        ce(dv(.UInt32 1711318607)c3)
        ce(dv(c(
            ce(Enum16("exact match" "starts with" "ends with" "contains") operator)
            ce(.String text)
        ) (0 'pass' ))c6)
        ce(dv(.String '.my-element')c7)
        ce(dv(.UInt32 20)c8)
        ce(dv(.UInt32 1711318607)c9)
        ce(dv(c(
            ce(Enum16("exact match" "starts with" "ends with" "contains") operator)
            ce(.String text)

        ce(dv(.UInt32 1711318607)c15)

            ce(Enum16("exact match" "starts with" "ends with" "contains") operator)
            ce(.String text)
        ) (0 'pass' ))c18)
        ce(dv(.String '.my-element')c19)
        ce(dv(.UInt32 1)c20)
        ce(dv(.UInt32 1711318607)c21)

            ce(Enum16("exact match" "starts with" "ends with" "contains") operator)
            ce(.String text)
        ) (0 'pass' ))c24)
        ce(dv(.String 'Expected a single element with selector (.non-existant-element) but found: 0')c25)

//VI Definition: ::Web Server::Interactive::WebApp::Tests::Contains Message.gvi
define (WebApp%3A%3ATests%3A%3AContains%20Message%2Egvi dv(.VirtualInstrument (
    Params: c(  //param block
        i(dv(.ErrorCluster (false 0 '' ))dataItem_ErrorIn)
        i(dv(.String '')dataItem_Message)
        o(dv(.Boolean false)dataItem_ErrorContainsMessage)
    )
    Locals: c(   // Data Space
        e(dv(.String 'WebApp::Tests::Contains Message.gvi')local3)
        ce(dv(.Int32 -1)c4)
        e(.ErrorCluster local5)
        e(.ErrorCluster local6)
        e(.String local7)
        e(.String local8)
        e(.Int32 local9)
        e(.String local10)
        e(.String local11)
        ce(dv(.Int32 0)c12)
        e(.Boolean local13)
        e(.Boolean local14)
    )
        clump(1
        Copy(dataItem_ErrorIn local5)
        Copy(local5 local6)
        Copy(local6.source local7)
        Copy(dataItem_Message local8)
        SearchSplitString(local7 local8 c12 local11 local10 local9 )
        IsNE(local9 c4 local13)
        Copy(local13 dataItem_ErrorContainsMessage)
/* Clump Ended. */    )
)))

        i(dv(.String '')dataItem_Selector)
        i(dv(.UInt32 0)dataItem_ColumnIndex)
        i(dv(c(
            e(Enum16("exact match" "starts with" "ends with" "contains") operator)
            e(.String text)
        ) (0 '' ))dataItem_TextMatchOptions)
        o(dv(c(
            e(.String type)
            e(.String configJSON)
        ) ('' '' ))dataItem_RuleSelector)

        e(dv(.String 'DeclarativeStyle::Selector::DataGrid - String Column - Text Match.gvi')local8)

        e(.UInt32 local10)
        e(.Int32 local11)

            e(.String text)

            e(Enum16("exact match" "starts with" "ends with" "contains") operator)
            e(.String text)
        ) local17)
        e(Enum16("exact match" "starts with" "ends with" "contains") local18)
        e(.String local19)
        e(dv(.String '')local20)
        e(.ErrorCluster local21)
        e(.ErrorCluster local22)
        e(.Boolean local23)

            ce(.String selector)
            ce(.Int32 index)
            ce(.String operator)
            ce(.String text)
        ) ('' 0 '' '' ))c28)
        e(c(
            e(.String selector)
            e(.Int32 index)
            e(.String operator)
            e(.String text)

        ce(dv(.Boolean true)c48)

        e(.Boolean local50)

        e(.String local52)

        e(.Occurrence local72)

        Copy(local17.text local19)

        Trigger(2)
        Wait(1)
        Wait(2)

    clump(1
    Perch(3)
        Xor(c54 local23 local69)
        BranchIfFalse(1 local69)
        Xor(c55 local23 local70)
        BranchIfFalse(2 local70)
        Branch(3)
    Perch(1)
        Branch(0)
    Perch(2)

//VI Definition: ::Web Server::Interactive::DeclarativeStyle::Support::Color to RGBA.gvi
define (DeclarativeStyle%3A%3ASupport%3A%3AColor%20to%20RGBA%2Egvi dv(.VirtualInstrument (
    Params: c(  //param block
        i(dv(.UInt32 4278190080)dataItem_ColorConstant)
        o(dv(.UInt8 0)dataItem_Red)
        o(dv(.UInt8 0)dataItem_Green)
        o(dv(.UInt8 0)dataItem_Blue)
        o(dv(.UInt8 0)dataItem_Alpha)
    )
    Locals: c(   // Data Space
        e(dv(.String 'DeclarativeStyle::Support::Color to RGBA.gvi')local5)
        e(.UInt32 local6)
        e(.UInt32 local7)
        ce(dv(.UInt32 4278190080)c8)
        e(.UInt32 local9)
        ce(dv(.UInt32 16711680)c10)
        e(.UInt32 local11)
        ce(dv(.UInt32 65280)c12)
        e(.UInt32 local13)
        ce(dv(.UInt32 255)c14)
        e(.UInt32 local15)
        ce(dv(.Int16 -24)c16)
        e(.UInt32 local17)
        e(.UInt8 local18)
        e(.UInt8 local19)
        ce(dv(.Int16 -16)c20)
        e(.UInt32 local21)
        e(.UInt8 local22)
        e(.UInt8 local23)
        ce(dv(.Int16 -8)c24)
        e(.UInt32 local25)
        e(.UInt8 local26)
        e(.UInt8 local27)
        ce(dv(.Int16 0)c28)
        e(.UInt32 local29)
        e(.UInt8 local30)
        e(.UInt8 local31)
    )
        clump(1
        Copy(dataItem_ColorConstant local6)
        Convert(local6 local7)
        And(c8 local7 local9)
        And(c10 local7 local11)
        And(c12 local7 local13)
        And(c14 local7 local15)
        Scale2X(local9 c16 local17)
        Convert(local17 local18)
        Copy(local18 dataItem_Alpha)
        Scale2X(local11 c20 local21)
        Convert(local21 local22)
        Copy(local22 dataItem_Red)
        Scale2X(local13 c24 local25)
        Convert(local25 local26)
        Copy(local26 dataItem_Green)
        Scale2X(local15 c28 local29)
        Convert(local29 local30)
        Copy(local30 dataItem_Blue)
/* Clump Ended. */    )
)))

    Params: c(  //param block
        i(dv(.UInt32 0)dataItem_Color)
        o(dv(.String '')dataItem_CssHexColor)
    )

        e(dv(.String 'DeclarativeStyle::Support::Color to CSS hex.gvi')local2)
        e(.UInt32 local3)
        ce(dv(.String '#%02x%02x%02x%02x')c4)
        e(.UInt8 local5)
        e(.UInt8 local6)
        e(.UInt8 local7)
        e(.UInt8 local8)
        e(dv(.String '')local9)
        e(.ErrorCluster local10)
        e(.ErrorCluster local11)
        e(.Boolean local12)
        e(.String local13)
        ce(dv(.Boolean false)c14)
        ce(dv(.Boolean true)c15)
        e(.ErrorCluster local16)
        e(.Boolean local17)
        e(.Int32 local18)
        e(.String local19)
        e(.ErrorCluster local20)
        e(.ErrorCluster local21)
        e(.Boolean local22)
        e(.Boolean local23)
        e(.ErrorCluster local24)
        e(.Occurrence local25)
    )
        clump(1
    Perch(3)
        Copy(dataItem_Color local3)
        DeclarativeStyle%3A%3ASupport%3A%3AColor%20to%20RGBA%2Egvi(local3 local5 local6 local7 local8)
        Copy(local21 local10)
        StringFormat(local9 c4 local10 local5 local6 local7 local8 )
        Copy(local10 local11)
        Copy(local11.status local12)
        Copy(local9 dataItem_CssHexColor)
        Xor(c14 local12 local22)
        BranchIfFalse(1 local22)
        Xor(c15 local12 local23)
        BranchIfFalse(2 local23)
        Branch(3)
    Perch(1)
        Branch(0)
    Perch(2)
        Copy(local11 local16)
        Copy(local16.status local17)
        Copy(local16.code local18)
        Copy(local16.source local19)
        Copy(local24 local20)
        JavaScriptInvoke(local25 true * 'LogLabVIEWError' * local17 local18 local19)
        Branch(0)
    Perch(0)
/* Clump Ended. */    )
)))

//VI Definition: ::Web Server::Interactive::DeclarativeStyle::Property::Custom Property.gvi
define (DeclarativeStyle%3A%3AProperty%3A%3ACustom%20Property%2Egvi dv(.VirtualInstrument (
    Params: c(  //param block
        i(a(c(
            e(.String name)
            e(.String value)
        ) *) dataItem_RulePropertiesIn)
        i(dv(.String '')dataItem_Name)
        i(dv(.String '')dataItem_Value)
        o(a(c(
            e(.String name)
            e(.String value)
        ) *) dataItem_RulePropertiesOut)
    )
    Locals: c(   // Data Space
        e(dv(.String 'DeclarativeStyle::Property::Custom Property.gvi')local8)
        e(.String local9)
        e(a(c(
            e(.String name)
            e(.String value)
        ) *) local12)
        e(.String local13)
        ce(dv(c(
            ce(.String name)
            ce(.String value)
        ) ('' '' ))c16)
        e(c(
            e(.String name)
            e(.String value)
        ) local19)
        e(a(c(
            e(.String name)
            e(.String value)
        ) *) local22)
        e(a(c(
            e(.String name)
            e(.String value)
        ) *) local25)
    )
        clump(1
        Copy(dataItem_Name local9)
        Copy(dataItem_RulePropertiesIn local12)
        Copy(dataItem_Value local13)
        Copy(c16 local19)
        Copy(local9 local19.name)
        Copy(local13 local19.value)
        ArrayConcatenate(local22 local12 local19 )
        Copy(local22 dataItem_RulePropertiesOut)
/* Clump Ended. */    )
)))

    Params: c(  //param block
        i(dv(.String '')dataItem_RuleSelectorJSON)
        i(dv(.String '')dataItem_RulePropertiesJSON)
        i(dv(.ErrorCluster (false 0 '' ))dataItem_ErrorIn)
        o(.JavaScriptDynamicRefNum dataItem_StyleReference)
        o(dv(.ErrorCluster (false 0 '' ))dataItem_ErrorOut)
    )
    Locals: c(   // Data Space
        e(dv(.String 'DeclarativeStyle::Support::DeclarativeStyle.jsli::CreateStyle')local5)
        e(.String local6)
        e(.String local7)
        e(.ErrorCluster local8)
        e(.ErrorCluster local9)
        e(.JavaScriptDynamicRefNum local10)
        e(.JavaScriptDynamicRefNum local11)
        e(.ErrorCluster local12)
        e(.Occurrence local13)
    )

        Copy(dataItem_RulePropertiesJSON local7)
        Copy(dataItem_ErrorIn local8)
        Copy(local8 local9)
        JavaScriptInvoke(local13 false local9 'WebVIDeclarativeStyle.createStyle' local10 local6 local7)

        Copy(local9 dataItem_ErrorOut)
/* Clump Ended. */    )
)))

//VI Definition: ::Web Server::Interactive::DeclarativeStyle::Create Style.gvi
define (DeclarativeStyle%3A%3ACreate%20Style%2Egvi dv(.VirtualInstrument (
    Params: c(  //param block
        i(dv(c(
            e(.String type)
            e(.String configJSON)
        ) ('' '' ))dataItem_RuleSelector)
        i(a(c(
            e(.String name)
            e(.String value)
        ) *) dataItem_RuleProperties)
        i(dv(.ErrorCluster (false 0 '' ))dataItem_ErrorIn)
        o(.JavaScriptDynamicRefNum dataItem_StyleReference)
        o(dv(.ErrorCluster (false 0 '' ))dataItem_ErrorOut)
    )
    Locals: c(   // Data Space
        e(dv(.String 'DeclarativeStyle::Create Style.gvi')local9)
        e(c(
            e(.String type)
            e(.String configJSON)
        ) local12)
        e(a(c(
            e(.String name)
            e(.String value)
        ) *) local15)
        e(.ErrorCluster local16)
        e(.String local17)
        e(.ErrorCluster local18)
        e(.String local19)
        e(.ErrorCluster local20)
        e(.JavaScriptDynamicRefNum local21)
        e(.ErrorCluster local22)
        e(.ErrorCluster local23)
        e(.JavaScriptDynamicRefNum local24)
        e(.JavaScriptDynamicRefNum local25)
        e(dv(.Boolean true)local26)
        e(dv(.Boolean true)local27)
    )
        clump(1
        Copy(dataItem_RuleSelector local12)
        Copy(dataItem_RuleProperties local15)
        Copy(dataItem_ErrorIn local16)
        FlattenToJSON(local12 local26 local17 local16 )
        FlattenToJSON(local15 local27 local19 local16 )
        DeclarativeStyle%3A%3ASupport%3A%3ADeclarativeStyle%2Ejsli%3A%3ACreateStyle(local17 local19 local16 local21 local22)
        Copy(local22 dataItem_ErrorOut)
        Convert(local21 local24)
        Copy(local24 dataItem_StyleReference)
/* Clump Ended. */    )
)))
enqueue (WebApp%3A%3ATests%3A%3Aerrors%2Egviweb)
//Finished!! :D
